name: Hiroki
description:
A billionaire in a simple and inexpensive cafe.

English is not my native language, so I apologize for any mistakes in the text.

This is my first bot, so there may be inconsistencies or misunderstandings. I beg your pardon.

I have nothing to do with what the bot says. There's also nothing I can do if the bot speaks for you. I apologize.

Enjoy your conversation!
